## Checklist

- [ ] one feature per PR
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `make check-deps` passes (dependency rule not broken)
- [ ] new packages have `_test.go`
- [ ] changes to `pkg/` are backwards-compatible or have an approved RFC
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
